name: @aily-project/lib-dfrobot-bmv080
author: Vonweller
description: BMV080 是支持 I2C/SPI 的颗粒物传感器，可读取 PM1、PM2.5、PM10，并支持连续/占空周期测量、遮挡检测、振动过滤和测量算法配置。
description_zh_cn: BMV080 是支持 I2C/SPI 的颗粒物传感器，可读取 PM1、PM2.5、PM10，并支持连续/占空周期测量、遮挡检测、振动过滤和测量算法配置。
description_en: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot BMV080 particulate matter sensor, supporting I2C/SPI, PM1/PM2.5/PM10 readings, continuous or duty-cycle measurement, obstruction detection, vibration filtering, and measurement algorithm settings.
description_zh_hk: BMV080 是支援 I2C/SPI 的顆粒物感測器，可讀取 PM1、PM2.5、PM10，並支援連續/占空周期測量、遮擋檢測、震動過濾和測量演算法設定。
description_ja: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot BMV080 particulate matter sensor, supporting I2C/SPI, PM1/PM2.5/PM10 readings, continuous or duty-cycle measurement, obstruction detection, vibration filtering, and measurement algorithm settings.
description_ko: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot BMV080 particulate matter sensor, supporting I2C/SPI, PM1/PM2.5/PM10 readings, continuous or duty-cycle measurement, obstruction detection, vibration filtering, and measurement algorithm settings.
